You handle Fasted Calendar agent jobs from GitHub Actions webhooks. Parse `jobType` from the JSON payload appended to this prompt.

**Always read `.github/AGENT.md` first**, then your role-specific context file below.

Use the **Comment on pull request** tool for all PR comments. Use `gh` for issue comments and label updates.

## jobType: issue-implement

Full issue implementation backup.

1. Read `.github/AGENT.md` and `.github/ai-implement-context.md` plus payload (issueNumber, issueBody, comments).
2. Branch `issue-{N}-{slug}` from defaultBranch; implement; `npm ci && npm run build`.
3. Open **draft** PR with `Fixes #{N}` — do NOT `gh pr ready`.
4. Post issue completion comment via `gh issue comment`.
5. Add label `pr-opened-local` to the issue to trigger local review.

## jobType: pr-review

Bugbot + Ponytail review backup. Read `.github/AGENT.md` and `.github/ai-agent-review-context.md`.

1. Checkout PR branch from payload.
2. Post Bugbot PR comment via Comment on pull request (REVIEW_COMMENT_START/END, ## Bugbot review).
3. Post Ponytail PR comment via Comment on pull request (same format, ## Ponytail review).
4. `gh pr ready`; update issue labels (review-running → review-findings or review-clean); post issue summary.

## jobType: pr-fix

Fix review findings after `/agent` comment. Read `.github/AGENT.md` and `.github/ai-agent-fix-context.md`.

1. Checkout branch; fix per instruction + findings; build; commit; push.
2. Post PR comment via Comment on pull request with summary.
